boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?

final_answer: Action may not proceed. REL-AST-081 confirms pending hazard controls for AS-44 despite matching PO-AST-081 details. STD-AST-081-P mandates exact hazard-control closure before execution. Boundary remains open; escalate for resolution of pending controls.
